acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: PC版で1-3 splitに分割時、各splitに独立したHistoryPaneが表示される
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: TerminalSplitPaneContent terminal slot restructured to [HistoryPane | PaneResizer | TerminalDisplay]; test 'renders a HistoryPane inside the split' passes.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: A=Claude / B=Codex で各HistoryがそのCLIのメッセージのみを同時に表示する（per-split独立fetchで実現）
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: New useSplitMessages hook fetches /messages?cliTool=<own cliToolId> independently per split; test 'shows each split its OWN cliToolId messages simultaneously (A=claude, B=codex)' asserts distinct message counts + split indices.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: A=Claude / B=Claude で両方ともClaudeのメッセージを表示する
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Each split keys useSplitMessages by its own cliToolId; two claude splits fetch the same cliTool and render the same messages (no cross-split client filter; S1-008).

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: 2 split同時検索で互いのハイライトを消し合わない（検索ハイライト名前空間のper-split分離）
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: makeHistoryNamespace(splitIndex) -> history-search-${idx}; HistoryPane uses it when splitIndex provided. Tests assert split-0 apply does not clobber split-1 CSS.highlights key, and clearing one namespace leaves the other untouched. globals.css adds ::highlight(history-search-0|1|2 / -current-0|1|2).

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: 既存HistoryPane機能（検索#716 / User onlyトグル#725 / 表示件数#701）がper-splitで動作
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Search is per-split (internal state + per-split namespace). User-only / display-limit / showArchived are passed as common values into each split's useSplitMessages fetch (limit, includeArchived) and HistoryPane display props (MVP common, per work plan).

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Historyの折りたたみが各splitで動作（MVPは全split共通挙動）
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Each split uses useHistoryPaneState (common, localStorage-backed); when visible renders history+resizer, when collapsed renders a split-scoped expand bar (data-testid=split-history-expand-${splitIndex}). Width applied relative to split inner area.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: worktree切替後も各CLIのHistoryが正しく表示
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: useSplitMessages resets messages + re-fetches on (worktreeId, cliToolId) change with requestId stale-guard; test 'resets messages and re-fetches when (worktreeId, cliToolId) changes' passes.

Only one existing test (WorktreeDetailRefactored TC-4 throttle) needed a test-side filter update for independent per-split /messages polling (analogous to the existing /current-output exclusion).

acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: tsc exit 0; ESLint 'No ESLint warnings or errors'; vitest 6738 passed / 0 failed; next build 'Compiled successfully' + 'Generating static pages (32/32)'.

notes: Implemented strictly TDD (Red-Green-Refactor) across 5 implementation phases. Phase 1: makeHistoryNamespace(splitIndex) + globals.css per-split ::highlight rules; applyHistoryHighlights/clearHistoryHighlights got optional namespace args (default = HISTORY_SEARCH_NAMESPACE). Phase 2: new useSplitMessages hook mirroring useTerminalPanePolling (requestId stale-guard, visibilitychange pause, refresh, (worktreeId,cliToolId)-keyed reset). Phase 3: HistoryPane additive splitIndex?/cliToolId? props (per-split highlight namespace when splitIndex given; cliToolId is metadata, no client-side filter per S1-008). Phase 4: TerminalSplitPaneContent embeds HistoryPane in a [History|Resizer|Terminal] layout, drives useSplitMessages per its cliToolId, routes onInsertToMessage via onHistoryInsertToMessage (parent binds splitIndex), refreshes split messages after send. Parent renderSplitPane wires history props + handleInsertToSplit(splitIndex). Phase 5: TerminalContainer.history prop made optional; parent stops passing it on PC and removed historyPaneMemo / top-level HistoryPane + useHistoryPaneState imports. All changes additive; mobile path unchanged. The only existing-test adjustment was WorktreeDetailRefactored TC-4: the per-split /messages poll (like the existing /current-output poll) is independent of the parent recovery throttle, so the test's recovery-call filter now also excludes /messages (mirrors the prior /current-output precedent). NOTE: changes left in working tree, not committed, per instructions.
follow_ups: S3-004 (documented MVP deferral): split-internal History visible/width are currently common across splits (single useHistoryPaneState backing localStorage). A future enhancement could make visible/width per-split if UX feedback requires it.
User-only #725 / display-limit #701 / showArchived #168 are common values across splits in this MVP. Per-split independent controls could be a follow-up.

e2e: the #735 data-testid='history-pane-expand' now only renders when TerminalContainer is given a history prop (not the PC default). The per-split expand bar uses data-testid='split-history-expand-${splitIndex}'. Any e2e relying on the top-level history-pane-expand on PC should be updated to the split-scoped testid.
Consider extracting parseMessageTimestamps into a shared util (currently duplicated in useSplitMessages.ts, useInfiniteMessages.ts, and WorktreeDetailSubComponents.tsx) — out of scope for #744.
